overview: The Village of Weston Tourism Commission held its reorganization meeting, electing new officers and approving a $5,000 grant to the Taste and Glow Balloonfest. The commission learned that a competing balloon event in Marshfield was canceled, potentially increasing attendance at the Weston event.

agenda.item: Call to order and Pledge of Allegiance
Election of officers (Chair, Vice Chair, Secretary)
Work product transmittals, educational presentations, reports
New business - Grant request: Taste and Glow Balloonfest
Remarks from staff and commission members

discussions.body: The commission elected Trustee Erling as Chair unanimously. Cushing was nominated for Vice Chair by a commissioner, seconded by Jackson, and approved unanimously. Renee was nominated and elected as Secretary unanimously.
The minutes from the April 21st meeting were approved. Motion was seconded by Renee and passed unanimously.

discussions.item: Grant Request - Taste and Glow Balloonfest
discussions.body: Brandon Jill of 3308 Green Pastures Lane presented on behalf of the Taste and Glow Balloonfest, reporting approximately 11,000-12,000 attendees last year. He announced that the competing Marshfield balloon event was canceled due to permit issues, making their event the sole hot air balloon event in the area. A commissioner noted the application showed 20 fewer rooms than last year. The commission requested better tracking of hotel room usage from the Holiday Inn Express for future reporting. A motion to approve $5,000 (same as last year) was made, seconded by Jackson, and passed unanimously.

Renee reported on attending the Alice in Dairyland dinner at Red Rock Orchard in Edgar, describing meeting the candidates including winner Anastasia. She noted the candidates toured Marathon County locations including Mullen's Cheese, and this was the first time Marathon County hosted the event since the 1970s.

actionItems: Approved $5,000 grant to Taste and Glow Balloonfest for their annual event
Taste and Glow organizers to provide hotel room usage data in their post-event report
Next meeting scheduled for July 20th at 4:00 PM
title: Tourism Commission
